creator: dwhite@resnet.uoregon.edu
text:
Second time in here in a week ;)

A patch to add a note that FreeBSD supports the Decision-Computer "Eight-Serial"
multiport serial cards via shared IRQ.

Possibly excessive info, but included in case anyone wants to contact them.

Originally-Submitted-By:  "Julian H. Stacey" <jhs@freebsd.org>

Fix: Apply this patch.  Posted to freebsd-doc.  FTPable by request.
